description: formFor per-field validators fire on real input (§41.14 + §55.1). Typing a too-short name "x" into the synth name input → .LengthFailed; an invalid email "not-an-email" → .PatternMismatch. Both fields go isValid false and the compound rollup stays false. Proves the bind:value → dotted write → validator-runner chain (the exact Bug-58 miscompile path).
rationale: §41.14 formFor fields carry the struct-field validators (name req length(>=2), email req pattern(/…/)). Driving the real auto-generated inputs recomputes each field's surface: LengthFailed / PatternMismatch tags, isValid false, rollup false.
